languages.text: "Эоганн, вы с генетором Таванти составите превосходный исследовательский тандем".
"Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, вы с генетором Таванти составите превосходный исследовательский тандем".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, you and Generator Tavanti will make an excellent research team."
"Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."
"Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."
"Eogunn, you and Generator Tavanti will make an excellent research team."
"Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

languages.text: «Eogunn, usted y la genetor Tavanti serán un gran equipo de investigación».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, usted y la genetor Tavanti serán un gran equipo de investigación».
«Eogunn, creo firmemente que Oksilda y usted descubrirán los secretos genéticos de Zarkov».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你和基因士塔凡蒂一定会成为绝佳的研究搭档。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你和基因士塔凡蒂一定会成为绝佳的研究搭档。”

languages.text: « Eogunn, la genetor Tavanti et vous formerez une excellente équipe de recherches. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, la genetor Tavanti et vous formerez une excellente équipe de recherches. »
« Eogunn, Oskilda et vous serez certainement en mesure de percer les mystères de la génétique de Zarkov. »

languages.text: "Sen ve Genetör Tavanti mükemmel bir araştırma ekibi olacaksınız Eogunn."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

traits.locale_text: "Sen ve Genetör Tavanti mükemmel bir araştırma ekibi olacaksınız Eogunn."
"Eogunn, Oksilda'yla birlikte Zarkov'un genetik sırlarını ortaya çıkaracağınızdan eminim."

languages.text: 「エオガン、君とオクシルダなら、二人でザルコフの遺伝的秘密を必ず解き明かせると確信している」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、君とオクシルダなら、二人でザルコフの遺伝的秘密を必ず解き明かせると確信している」

languages.text: "Eogunn, Ihr und Genetor Tavanti werdet ein ausgezeichnetes Forschungsteam abgeben."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you and Genetor Tavanti will make an excellent research team."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Ihr und Genetor Tavanti werdet ein ausgezeichnetes Forschungsteam abgeben."
"Eogunn, ich bin sicher, Ihr und Oksilda werdet Zarkovs genetische Geheimnisse gemeinsam lüften."
